goal: Research Cheonma legacy code to extract and define the canonical terminology standard, including endpoint nouns, error-code vocabulary, and casing rules.

outputs.description: JSON object containing the definitive list of allowed endpoint nouns, error codes, and casing conventions derived from legacy code.

goal: Write the worked integration tutorial with runnable code samples for checkout and refund flows, strictly adhering to the canonical standard published by root.1.

outputs.description: Markdown content for the tutorial including code blocks for checkout and refund flows, using only terms defined in root.1/canonical_standard.json.

goal: Assemble the final bilingual (EN/KR) developer style guide by combining the canonical standard and the tutorial, performing a final validation to ensure zero term drift between parts.

outputs.description: Final English version of the bilingual style guide.
Final Korean version of the bilingual style guide.
